channel.title: 🚀 Ultimate AI Feed - Authority First, Signal Over Noise
channel.description: Top 10 daily: semantic analysis, smart dedup, authority-first, quality over quantity.

item.title: [1] [大V/权威] Amazon is already offering new OpenAI products on AWS
item.description:
📊 Score: 170 | Category: 大V/权威

📡 Source: TechCrunch | Domain: techcrunch.com

✨ Why selected:

  • Source:TechCrunch(+15)
  • ✓A-Domain:techcrunch.com(+30)

  • ✓Industry-Gate:pass(+20)
  • real_release

📄 Summary: A day after OpenAI got Microsoft to agree to end exclusive rights, AWS announced a slate of OpenAI model offerings, including a new agent service....

item.title: [2] [大V/权威] DeepMind’s David Silver just raised $1.1B to build an AI that learns without human data
item.description:
📊 Score: 148 | Category: 大V/权威

📡 Source: TechCrunch | Domain: techcrunch.com

✨ Why selected:

  • Source:TechCrunch(+15)
  • ✓A-Domain:techcrunch.com(+30)
  • ⭐A-Authority:deepmind(+70)
  • ❌Industry-Gate:fail(-30)
  • top_research

📄 Summary: Ineffable Intelligence, a British AI lab founded a mere few months ago by former DeepMind researcher David Silver, has raised $1.1 billion in funding at a valuation of $5.1 billion....

item.title: [3] [模型算法] Aycromo: An Open-Source Platform for Automatic Chromosome Detection in Metaphase Images Based on Deep Learning
item.description:
📊 Score: 117 | Category: 模型算法

📡 Source: AlphaXiv | Domain: arxiv.org

✨ Why selected:

  • Source:AlphaXiv(+25)
  • 🔒S-Domain:arxiv.org(+50)
  • ✓Industry-Gate:pass(+20)
  • real_release
  • TimeFactor:×0.9

📄 Summary: Chromosome analysis is a fundamental step in the diagnosis of genetic diseases, but the manual karyotyping workflow is time-consuming and heavily dependent on expert specialists, often requiring several days per patient. Although Deep Learning models have achieved high performance in chromosome detection, most proposed solutions remain restricted t...

item.title: [4] [模型算法] XGRAG: A Graph-Native Framework for Explaining KG-based Retrieval-Augmented Generation
item.description:
📊 Score: 112 | Category: 模型算法

📡 Source: AlphaXiv | Domain: arxiv.org

✨ Why selected:

  • Source:AlphaXiv(+25)
  • 🔒S-Domain:arxiv.org(+50)
  • L3-Tech:rag(+15)
  • L3-Tech:retrieval(+15)
  • ✓Industry-Gate:pass(+20)
  • TimeFactor:×0.9

📄 Summary: Graph-based Retrieval-Augmented Generation (GraphRAG) extends traditional RAG by using knowledge graphs (KGs) to give large language models (LLMs) a structured, semantically coherent context, yielding more grounded answers. However, GraphRAG reasoning process remains a black-box, limiting our ability to understand how specific pieces of structured ...

item.title: [5] [模型算法] Exploiting Differential Flatness for Efficient Learning-based Model Predictive Control of Constrained Multi-Input Control Affine Systems
item.description:
📊 Score: 103 | Category: 模型算法

📡 Source: AlphaXiv | Domain: arxiv.org

✨ Why selected:

  • Source:AlphaXiv(+25)
  • 🔒S-Domain:arxiv.org(+50)
  • L1-Tech:npu(+40)
  • TimeFactor:×0.9

📄 Summary: Learning-based control techniques use data from past trajectories to control systems with uncertain dynamics. However, learning-based controllers are often computationally inefficient, limiting their practicality. To address this limitation, we propose a learning-based controller that exploits differential flatness, a property of many robotic syste...

item.title: [6] [模型算法] Green Shielding: A User-Centric Approach Towards Trustworthy AI
item.description:
📊 Score: 103 | Category: 模型算法

📡 Source: AlphaXiv | Domain: arxiv.org

✨ Why selected:

  • Source:AlphaXiv(+25)
  • 🔒S-Domain:arxiv.org(+50)
  • L1-Tech:npu(+40)
  • TimeFactor:×0.9

📄 Summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed, yet their outputs can be highly sensitive to routine, non-adversarial variation in how users phrase queries, a gap not well addressed by existing red-teaming efforts. We propose Green Shielding, a user-centric agenda for building evidence-backed deployment guidance by characterizing how benign...

item.title: [7] [平台底座] SAW-INT4: System-Aware 4-Bit KV-Cache Quantization for Real-World LLM Serving

item.title: [8] [行业动态] Otter’s new feature lets users search across their enterprise tools
item.description:
📊 Score: 100 | Category: 行业动态

📡 Source: TechCrunch | Domain: techcrunch.com

✨ Why selected:

  • Source:TechCrunch(+15)
  • ✓A-Domain:techcrunch.com(+30)
  • ✓Industry-Gate:pass(+20)
  • real_release

📄 Summary: With this launch, users can connect their Gmail, Google Drive, Notion, Jira, and Salesforce accounts and query that data along with existing meeting data. The company said that it will soon allow connections with Microsoft Outlook, Teams, SharePoint, and Slack....
